S.FORM: Will Arnett kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 4 nqu tay 5, Will Arnett, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: will arnett kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, will arnett, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
